testcase.name: Verify GET request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify GET request &amp#27;[90m# src/test/java/features/api.feature:3&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI send a GET request to &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.APISteps.sendGetRequest(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe response status code should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.APISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.Integer)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Create, retrieve, and delete a user

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <201> but was <401>.

testcase.failure:
